{{Quote|At the Chorax system you have us skirting it by .25 parsecs. There's only one planetary mass in that system and the sun isn't that big.|[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|<ref name="XW:RS" />}}
'''Chorax''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Rachuk sector/Legends|Rachuk sector]], which lay between [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] and [[Talasea]]. It was the sole planet of the [[Chorax system/Legends|Chorax system]], a haven for [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]].<ref name="XW:RS" />

==History==
{{Quote|The data you used to compute the course indicated giving the system a wider berth, but that's because you're using merchant data and they're afraid of pirates and smugglers working the system. We're a squadron of X-wings. We have nothing to worry about.|[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]|<ref name="XW:RS" />}}
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] ''[[Nonnah]]'' once crashed on Chorax. Subsequently, [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] had to [[Search for the Nonnah|save]] the ship's crew from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces.<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />

In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], during the [[Core Campaign]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|''Interdictor''-class heavy cruiser]] [[Corusca Rainbow|''Black Asp'']] [[Battle in the Chorax system|ambushed]] the [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] ''[[Pulsar Skate]]'' in the system.<ref name="XW:RS" /> During the [[Bacta War]], [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] [[Raid on Thyferran Convoy Delta-Two-Niner|raided]] the [[Thyferran Convoy Delta-Two-Niner]] in the Chorax system.<ref name="XW:TBW">''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]''</ref>
